context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct (non-deprecated) JavaScript package, follows the JS SDK calling conventions, applies voice settings using the correct camelCase property names, and selects appropriate output formats.

checklist.name: Correct JS package
checklist.description: package.json lists @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js as a dependency, NOT the deprecated 'elevenlabs' package

checklist.name: Voice ID as positional arg
checklist.description: Calls client.textToSpeech.convert(voiceId, { ... }) with voice_id as the first positional argument, not inside the options object

checklist.name: CamelCase voice settings
checklist.description: Uses camelCase property names in voiceSettings object (e.g., similarityBoost, useSpeakerBoost) not snake_case

checklist.name: CamelCase modelId
checklist.description: Uses 'modelId' (camelCase) as the parameter name, not 'model_id' (snake_case)

checklist.name: Valid model ID
checklist.description: Uses a valid ElevenLabs model ID (one of: eleven_v3, eleven_multilingual_v2, eleven_flash_v2_5, eleven_flash_v2, eleven_turbo_v2_5)

checklist.name: Different voice settings per type
checklist.description: Configures different stability and/or similarityBoost values for at least two of the notification types

checklist.name: Valid voice IDs used
checklist.description: Uses at least one of the documented voice IDs (JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb, EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL, onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9, XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa)

checklist.name: Valid output format
checklist.description: References at least one valid output format string (e.g. mp3_44100_128, pcm_24000, ulaw_8000, mp3_44100_192, pcm_16000, pcm_22050, pcm_44100)

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
checklist.description: Uses ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable for authentication (not hardcoded key)
